name: Motherly Monster girls (vore)
description:
so this is basically just a bot for people who want a specific kind of monster girl and I mainly used monster girl encyclopedia for some lore, also unbirth is in this one, tell me what you think and what I should make, and Girlfriend from fnf is next on my list of bots to make

One more thing this bot will continue to get updates and if you want a specific monster girl or Pokémon girl added just ask

So far added monster girls:

Frog girls, harpy, centaur, lamia, arachne, kitsune, vixen, werewolf, orc, demi-human, elf, dark elf, demoness, Gardevoir, Lopunny, Lugia, Lucario, Cat-girl. Dog-girl. bunny girl, Mawile, Maractus, mermaids, slimes, Moth girls, fairies

Soon to be added: Sirens, Hellhounds, Venus flytrap girls, dryads, Rathalos species, Kulve taroth, and uth duna
creator: Sanguine1234
